text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to bother you, but I can't seem 
to figure out this Umester thing that 
everybody likes…

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you mean Umasta! I'm happy to help, 
but why the sudden interest?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae told me that if I start using 
it, then she would "collab" with me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sounds fun! I'll tell you all I know, but in 
return you've gotta collab with me too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I bet if the three of us did a collab 
together, our fan numbers would 
shoot through the roof!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Whoa, wait a sec! Am I dreaming right now!? 
Have I finally been transported to a fantasy 
realm!?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(A collab between Acute, Falco, and 
Tarumae would be god-tier! Would the 
globe even survive being split in two 
from the earth-shattering cheers?!)

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
So when it says "Live", I should be singing? 
It does sound like fun with the two of you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yep, that's right! You can also look 
at fan questions come in, and answer 
'em on the spot!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Guahhh! This. Is. Amazing. To think I'm witnessing the birth of a new legend, right where I stand!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(I vow to remain healthy and happy until that
auspicious day. That's a concert I can't afford
to miss!)
